name: eas

subcommands.name: build:inspect
subcommands.description: Inspect the state of the project at specific build stages, useful for troubleshooting

name: -e
--profile
options.description: Name of the build profile from eas.json. Defaults to "production" if defined in eas.json

name: -o
--output
options.description: (required) Output directory

name: -p
--platform
options.description: (required)

name: -s
--stage
options.description:
(required) Stage of the build you want to inspect.
archive - builds the project archive that would be uploaded to EAS when building
pre-build - prepares the project to be built with Gradle/Xcode. Does not run the native build.
post-build - builds the native project and leaves the output directory for inspection

options.description: Delete OUTPUT_DIRECTORY if it already exists

options.description: Start queries from specified index. Use for paginating results. Defaults to 0
